od_description: Udhampur ↔ Chenani on NH-44 (Chenani–Nashri / Dr. S.P. Mookerjee tunnel corridor), Udhampur district — JAMMU division.
stops_verdict: Strong stops around Udhampur town (139/24, 109/19, 74/23) — genuine, but on a Jammu-division highway route.
narrative: OUT OF AREA. This corridor sits ~125 km south of the Srinagar hub, entirely in Jammu division (Udhampur ↔ Chenani on NH-44). in_area=false; the only candidate permit has 0.0 overlap.
